name: Rhubarb Crumble
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, brown sugar, melted butter, oatmeal, and cinnamon until crumbly.
2. Press half of this mixture onto the bottom and part way up the sides of a greased 13 x 9 pan. Sprinkle rhubarb evenly over the bottom.
3. In a saucepan, combine granulated sugar, cornstarch, water, and vanilla. Heat to boiling, cook until thickened (about 1 minute).
4. Pour the sauce over the rhubarb; top with remaining crumbly mixture.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.
